Subject: Invitation: NFL Mock Draft Virtual Competition — 2026-04-11

Dear Ryan Douglas,

We would like to invite you to **NFL Mock Draft Virtual Competition** on **2026-04-11**.

Inaugural NFL mock draft virtual competition for students. Simulates a front office experience for strategic roster management through scouting, trades, and careful player selection. Teams are randomly assigned an NFL team and control their picks per real draft positioning. Two-round draft with 5-minute pick windows, judged by sport industry professionals.

This event is tailored for: Sports Management.

Please let us know if you can attend.

Best regards,
School of Medicine Events Team
